sizing_rule.note: Position size = (1.0% × Account_Equity) / ATR(14). Dollar risk fixed at 1% of equity; position quantity scales inversely with 14-period ATR to normalize volatility exposure across instruments.

source_rule_text: A trader should size positions by limiting dollar risk exposure to a fixed percentage of account volatility, scaling position quantity inversely with instrument volatility to maintain consistent risk per trade.
